public_reputation: Industrial stone-wizard supervising heat stabilization and tower-forge containment.

manner: Handles arcane procedure with containment-minded precision, as if carelessness always has a cost. current_agenda: Keep Titan Towers, Soreheim workable through the obligations of wizards while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must hold procedure, hazard awareness, and institutional oversight together around forces that do not forgive carelessness.
